selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 雄性动物, 雄猫
words.definition: n. male cat

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 安娜（女子名）
words.definition: n. a former copper coin of Pakistan and India

words.translation: n. 玛丽亚（女名）
words.definition: n. valuable timber tree of Panama

words.translation: n. 鼠, 卑鄙的人, 破坏者, 变节者；vi. 捕鼠, 变节
words.definition: n. any of various long-tailed rodents similar to but larger than a mouse

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: n. 堂兄弟姊妹, 表兄弟姊妹
words.definition: n. the child of your aunt or uncle

words.translation: 太太
words.definition: n. a form of address for a married woman

words.translation: n. 大头针, 针, 别针, 栓, 销子, 图钉, 插头, 管脚, 品(液量单位)；vt. 将...用针别住, 钉住, 压住, 牵制, 使不能动, 归罪于
words.definition: n. a piece of jewelry that is pinned onto the wearer's garment

words.translation: n. 奶油, 黄油；vt. 涂黄油于
words.definition: n. an edible emulsion of fat globules made by churning milk or cream; for cooking and table use

words.translation: n. 孔, 洞, 穴, 漏洞；vt. 挖洞, 掘坑
words.definition: n. an opening into or through something

words.translation: n. 生面团
words.definition: n. a flour mixture stiff enough to knead or roll

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 噪音, 杂音, 响声, 喧闹；vt. 谣传
words.definition: n. sound of any kind (especially unintelligible or dissonant sound)

words.translation: n. 地板, 楼层, 底部, 底价；vt. 铺地板, 打倒
words.definition: n. the inside lower horizontal surface (as of a room, hallway, tent, or other structure)

words.translation: n. 厨房, 全套炊具
words.definition: n. a room equipped for preparing meals

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: n. 充足, 够, 很多；a. 充足的, 足够
words.definition: n. an adequate quantity; a quantity that is large enough to achieve a purpose

words.translation: n. 火, 炉火, 电炉, 火灾, 闪光体, 炮火, 热情；vt. 点燃, 烧制, 使发光, 激动, 放枪, 解雇
words.definition: n. the event of something burning (often destructive)

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: n. 顶部, 顶端, 极点, 上面, 上部, 顶篷, 最高地位, 首位, 陀螺；a. 最高的, 顶上的, 头等的
words.definition: n. the upper part of anything

words.translation: n. 晚餐, 正餐, 宴会
words.definition: n. the main meal of the day served in the evening or at midday

words.translation: n. 内部, 内脏, 内幕；a. 内部的, 秘密的, 户内的
words.definition: n. the region that is inside of something

words.translation: n. 前面, 开头, 前线, 阵线, 态度；vt. 面对, 朝向, 对抗
words.definition: n. the side that is forward or prominent

words.translation: a. 旋转的, 波动的, 起伏的；n. 旋转, 轰响, 动摇
a. 确信, 必然的, 必定的；adv. 当然, 确实地, 无疑地
words.definition: s. physically secure or dependable

words.translation: n. 去, 离去, 工作情况, 地面状况, 行为；a. 进行中的, 流行的, 成功的, 现存的
words.definition: n. advancing toward a goal

words.translation: n. 日落, 同伙, 组合, 集合, 装置；vt. 放, 安置, 放置, 设定, 使凝结, 点燃, 确定, 点缀, 使就位, 树立, 分配, 调整
words.definition: n. a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used

words.translation: n. 烟, 雾气, 烟熏剂, 抽烟, 烟色；vi. 吸烟, 冒烟, 弥漫
words.definition: n. a cloud of fine particles suspended in a gas

words.translation: n. 了不起的人, 大人物；pron. 有人, 某人
n. 石头, 宝石, 果核, 纪念碑, 结石；vt. 投扔石子, 铺石头
words.definition: n. building material consisting of a piece of rock hewn in a definite shape for a special purpose

words.translation: pron. 任何事
words.definition: n. Any object, act, state, event, or fact whatever; thing of

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制
words.definition: n. a small fragment of something broken off from the whole

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
n. 公开, 户外, 空旷；a. 开着的, 开放的, 开阔的, 营业着的, 公开的, 悬而未决的
words.definition: n. a clear or unobstructed space or expanse of land or water

words.translation: n. 房间, 空位, 场所；vi. 住宿, 居住
words.definition: n. an area within a building enclosed by walls and floor and ceiling

words.translation: vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落；vt. 使就座, 骑
words.definition: v. be seated

words.translation: n. 儿子, 女婿, 子孙
words.definition: n. a male human offspring

words.translation: n. 站立, 站住, 停顿, 讲台, 看台, 立场, 法院证人席；vi. 站, 立, 坐落, 停滞, 位于, 坚持, 维持原状
words.definition: n. the position where a thing or person stands

words.translation: n. 停留, 逗留, 制止, 延缓, 停止, 支柱, 支撑物, 支索；vt. 制止, 延缓, 坚持, 支持, 支撑, 用支索固定
words.definition: n. continuing or remaining in a place or state

words.translation: a. 强壮的, 坚固的, 坚强的, 强烈的, 有力的, 优良的；adv. 强劲地, 有力地, 猛烈地
words.definition: a. having strength or power greater than average or expected

words.translation: n. 墙, 墙壁, 垣, 内壁, 分界物, 屏障；a. 墙的
words.definition: n. an architectural partition with a height and length greater than its thickness; used to divide or enclose an area or to support another structure

words.translation: a. 害怕的, 恐怕的, 遗憾的
words.definition: a. filled with fear or apprehension

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 胸, 胸部, 衣柜, 箱子
words.definition: n. box with a lid; used for storage; usually large and sturdy

words.translation: n. 亲爱的人；a. 亲爱的, 昂贵的, 严重的, 急迫的
n. 尾部, 后部, 辫子, 随员, 特务, 燕尾服, 踪迹, 限定继承(权)；a. 在后面的, 从后面而来的, 限定继承的, 尾部的, 后部的
words.definition: n. the posterior part of the body of a vertebrate especially when elongated and extending beyond the trunk or main part of the body

words.translation: n. 轮子, 车轮, 轮, 方向盘, 旋转, 机构, 重要人物；vt. 使旋转, 转动, 使转向
words.definition: n. a simple machine consisting of a circular frame with spokes (or a solid disc) that can rotate on a shaft or axle (as in vehicles or other machines)

words.translation: n. 袋子, 袋状物；vt. 使膨大, 装袋, 猎获
words.definition: n. a flexible container with a single opening

words.translation: n. 木板, 甲板, 膳食, 会议桌；vt. 乘船, 供膳食, 用板覆盖
words.definition: n. a committee having supervisory powers

words.translation: n. 黑暗, 夜, 黄昏, 模糊；a. 黑暗的, 暗的, 深色的, 隐密的, 模糊的, 无知的
words.definition: n. absence of light or illumination

words.translation: vt. 除, 除外；vi. 反对
n. 农夫, 农场主
words.definition: n. a person who operates a farm

words.translation: a. 热的, 热心的, 辣的, 热情的, 激动的, 猛烈的, 紧迫的；adv. 热, 紧迫地
words.definition: a. used of physical heat; having a high or higher than desirable temperature or giving off heat or feeling or causing a sensation of heat or burning

words.translation: n. 跳跃, 跳动, 暴涨, 惊跳；vt. 跳跃, 跃过, 突升, 使跳跃

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的

words.translation: n. 搜寻, 查究；v. 搜寻, 搜查, 探求, 调查, 搜索
words.definition: n. the activity of looking thoroughly in order to find something or someone

words.translation: n. 蓝色；a. 蓝色的, 下流的, 忧郁的
words.definition: n. blue color or pigment; resembling the color of the clear sky in the daytime

words.translation: n. 食橱, 碗柜, 餐具柜
words.definition: n. a small room (or recess) or cabinet used for storage space

words.translation: adv. 平行地, 向前；prep. 沿着
words.definition: r. with a forward motion

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏
words.definition: a. having undesirable or negative qualities

words.translation: n. 进位, 射程, 运载；vt. 携带, 运送, 支持, 传送, 包含

words.translation: n. 脸, 面容, 正面, 外观；vt. 面对, 朝, 正视, 面临

words.translation: n. 落下, 瀑布, 采伐量, 下降, 落差, 降低, 堕落, 秋天；vi. 倒下, 落下, 来临, 失守, 阵亡, 下跌, 减弱, 倾斜, 垮台, 轮到, 变成, 降低
words.definition: n. the season when the leaves fall from the trees

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离
words.definition: a. located at a great distance in time or space or degree

words.translation: n. 父亲, 祖先, 长辈, 神父, 创始者；vt. 当...的父亲, 保护, 创作, 发明, 培养

words.translation: n. 恐怖, 害怕, 担心；v. 害怕, 恐惧, 为...担心, 敬畏

words.translation: n. 食物, 养料

words.translation: n. 朋友, 支持者, 赞助者

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的

words.translation: a. 坚硬的, 硬的, 难的, 艰苦的, 困难的, 坚固的, 猛烈的, 艰难的, 结实的, 确实的；adv. 坚硬地, 努力地, 辛苦地, 接近地, 猛烈地, 牢固地
words.definition: a. dispassionate;

words.translation: a. 迟的, 晚的, 已故的；adv. 很晚, 很迟, 晚

words.translation: n. 最少, 最小, 最小限度；a. 最少的, 最小的
words.definition: n. something that is of no importance

words.translation: vt. 遗失, 损失, 丢失, 使失去, 错过, 浪费, 迷失, 使迷路, 输去, 使沉溺于；vi. 受损失, 失败

words.translation: n. 会, 集会；a. 适宜的, 合适的

words.translation: n. 片刻, 瞬间, 重要, 阶段, 力矩

words.translation: n. 名字, 名称, 姓名, 名义, 名誉, 文件名；vt. 命名, 称呼, 任命, 提名, 列举

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作

words.translation: n. 无, 不关紧要之事, 零；adv. 毫不, 决不

words.translation: n. 给予(物), 出价, 提议, 意图, 报价；vt. 提供, 出价, 奉献, 试图, 使出现, 演出

words.translation: n. 父母, 父母亲, 根源

words.translation: n. 人, 人身, 人称

words.translation: n. 种族, 人种, 赛跑, 比赛, 急流, 人类, 同道, 姜根；vi. 赛跑, 竞赛, 疾走

words.translation: n. 上升, 增加, 上涨, 高地, 升高, 出现；vi. 升起, 起身, 起立, 上升, 上涨, 增长, 高耸, 起义, 浮现

words.translation: n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；a. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的

words.translation: n. 跑, 赛跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趋向, 流出, 运转时间, 连续；vi. 跑, 奔跑, 跑步, 赛跑, 竞赛, 行驶, 运转, 进行, 蔓延

words.translation: a. 严肃的, 认真的, 重要的, 严重的；[电] 严重的
words.definition: a. concerned with work or important matters rather than play or trivialities

words.translation: a. 几个的, 一些的, 各自的；pron. 几个

words.translation: n. 旁边, 侧, 方面, 胁, 侧边, 血统；a. 旁的, 侧的, 次要的

words.translation: n. 先生, 阁下

words.translation: n. 想法, 思想, 思维, 关心, 挂念；think的过去式和过去分词

words.definition: r. in contact with each other or in proximity

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前；conj. 直到...时, 在...以前

words.translation: n. 走, 散步, 步行, 行走的路程, 竞走, 散步场所；vi. 走路, 步行, 处世
words.definition: n. the act of traveling by foot

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的

words.translation: a. 宽的, 广阔的, 普遍的, 宽阔的, 广泛的, 一般的；adv. 广阔地, 遍及各处地, 广泛地

words.translation: n. 妻子, 太太, 夫人

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽
a. 巨大的, 庞大的
words.definition: s. extraordinarily large in size or extent or amount or power or degree; that a whole civilization should be dependent on technology"- Walter Lippman

words.translation: a. 失去的, 遗失的, 迷惑的；lose的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: a. no longer in your possession or control; unable to be found or recovered

words.translation: vt. 借, 借入, 借用；vi. 借

words.translation: a. 肮脏的, 卑鄙的；vt. 弄脏
words.definition: a. soiled or likely to soil with dirt or grime

words.translation: a. 空的, 空虚的, 空腹的, 空洞的；n. 空的东西, 空车
a. 好笑的, 有趣的, 滑稽的；n. 滑稽人物

words.translation: n. 兽皮, 迹象, 躲藏处；vt. 藏, 隐瞒, 遮避, 剥...的皮, 隐藏

words.translation: n. 充分, 很多, 丰富；a. 很多的, 足够的, 丰富的
words.definition: n. a full supply

words.translation: n. 关闭；vt. 关上, 闭起, 幽禁, 合拢, 轧住
n. 味道, 气味, 嗅觉, 嗅, 臭味, 气息；vt. 闻, 探出, 察觉, 发出...的气味

words.translation: vt. 剽窃；偷偷地做；偷窃；vi. 窃取；偷偷地行动；[棒球]偷垒；n. [口]偷窃；便宜货；偷垒；[篮球]断球

words.translation: n. 条, 棒, 酒吧, 栅, 障碍物；vt. 禁止, 阻挡, 妨碍

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
a. 庄重的, 壮观的, 显赫的, 重大的, 最高的, 雄伟的, 宏大的, 豪华的, 傲慢的

words.translation: n. 午后, 下午

words.translation: a. 孤独的, 单独的, 独自的；adv. 独自地
words.definition: s. isolated from others

words.translation: a. 美丽的
